dashboard.activityJoined: A new member joined the group

settings.subject: Subject
settings.deleteWarning: Once you delete a group, there is no going back. All data will be permanently removed.
settings.leaderOnly: Only the group leader can modify settings.

notifications.title: Group Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Leaders approve announcements, contributors can draft, and members read published items.

seed.roadmapContent: A new checkpoint is open this week. Please complete pre-learning before Friday.
seed.quizContent: Contributor proposed a quiz refresh for the reading practice set.

messages.basicsSaveError: Unable to save the group basics.
messages.confirmSaveError: Unable to finish the group setup.

validation.knowledge: Please describe the shared knowledge scope.
validation.analysisLoading: Quizmate AI is still analyzing the domain. Please wait a moment.
validation.analysisError: Quizmate AI could not infer the domain yet. Please retry the analysis.
validation.analysisMissing: Please enter the knowledge scope so Quizmate AI can infer the domain.
validation.domain: Please select one domain from the Quizmate AI suggestions.
validation.groupGoal: Please enter the group learning goal.

basic.title: Basics & Ground Rules
basic.description: Group name and the shared operating rules

learning.title: Shared Learning Profile
learning.description: Knowledge, domain, and the team learning rhythm

stepOne.title: Set up the group basics
stepOne.description: Name the group and add shared operating notes so everyone follows the same study rhythm.
stepOne.groupNameHint: Use a short, recognizable name so members can spot this group immediately.
stepOne.memberDescription: Best for regular learners joining the group.
stepOne.contributorDescription: Best for members who can contribute learning content and activities.
stepOne.rulesHint: Capture the study rhythm, collaboration rules, or material-sharing norms the whole group should follow.
stepOne.rulesPlaceholder: Example: Run two check-ins per week, ask questions by topic, and cite the source when sharing materials.

stepTwo.title: Set up the shared learning profile
stepTwo.description: This step defines the shared knowledge scope, the AI domain, and the default learning rhythm for the whole group.

workflow.title: Finish the setup in three focused choices
workflow.description: Describe what the group is learning, pick the AI-suggested domain, and turn on the options that match your learning flow.
workflow.describeDescription: Briefly explain what the group is learning or preparing for.
workflow.domainDescription: Choose the right baseline so the AI understands this workspace correctly.
workflow.modeDescription: Decide whether the group is focused on new learning, review, or mock tests.

stepTwo.knowledgePlaceholder: Example: Our group is studying JLPT N3 to strengthen grammar, vocabulary, and reading practice by topic.
stepTwo.knowledgeHint: The more specific the description is, the better Quizmate AI can suggest the right domain for your group.
stepTwo.selectedDomainHint: This domain becomes the shared baseline for roadmap suggestions, quizzes, and learning activities.
stepTwo.modePrompt: Choose the main learning rhythm for the group
stepTwo.studyNewDescription: Best when the group is learning new material and needs a clear roadmap.
stepTwo.reviewDescription: Best when the group has studied before and wants a structured review flow.
stepTwo.mockTestDescription: Best when the group wants to practice exams and track progress with tests.
stepTwo.groupGoalPlaceholder: Example: Finish 20 grammar themes and 1500 vocabulary items in 8 weeks.
stepTwo.learningSwitchesHint: Turn on a roadmap or entry assessment depending on how your group runs.

analysis.loading: Quizmate AI is analyzing the knowledge scope to suggest the best domain.
analysis.error: Quizmate AI could not generate a reliable domain suggestion yet. You can retry now.
analysis.interpretingLabel: Quizmate AI understands this knowledge as
analysis.tooBroad: The current knowledge scope is still broad. Add a bit more focus if you want more precise suggestions.
analysis.emptyDomainDescription: Quizmate AI could not build domain suggestions from the current description. Try adding more detail or rerun the analysis.

roadmap.title: Enable a shared roadmap
roadmap.description: Create a shared study structure so the whole group has a clearer pace.
roadmap.studyNewDescription: This mode turns the roadmap on by default so the group has a clearer path for new learning.

entryAssessment.title: Require an entry assessment
entryAssessment.description: Apply this to new members before they join the shared learning flow.

bootstrap.title: Preparing your group workspace
bootstrap.description: The setup wizard will open as soon as the draft workspace is ready.

challenge.title: Challenge
challenge.description: Compete with your group members in real-time quiz challenges.
challenge.cancelDialogDescription: Are you sure you want to cancel this challenge? Members will no longer be able to join and the schedule will be removed.
challenge.snapshotQuizHint: Preview content and status; edit via Compose before the challenge starts.
challenge.quizSnapshotReviewDraftBody: This exam belongs to a challenge, not the shared group quiz list. Members only take it when the challenge starts. Use the Check tab to review content, edit via Compose, then Publish when ready — there is no group-wide distribution like normal group quizzes.
challenge.quizSnapshotReviewNoTakeHint: This exam only opens when the challenge starts (on schedule or when the leader runs it). Rankings are per challenge — you cannot start the exam from this screen.
challenge.editDialogDescription: You can only edit when more than 1 hour remains before the scheduled start. Double-check timezone and duration.
challenge.leaderFairPlayQuizHint: You're competing: after the quiz is published you can't preview questions. While it's still a draft you can compose and review.
challenge.reviewContributorsHint: Assigned members cannot register for this challenge. You cannot assign someone who is already a participant.
challenge.reviewContributorCannotRegister: You are assigned as a quiz reviewer, so you cannot register for this challenge.
